sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Mariner, State Street to scale operations via Charles River platform
feed.summary: Mariner and State Street have partnered to implement Charles River Development's wealth management solution. This collaboration aims to scale Mariner's operations, supporting its expansion towards 5,000 advisers. Charles River Development, a subsidiary of State Street, provides the financial technology platform for this initiative.

feed.title: ABS veteran Christopher Wiernicki joins Royal Caribbean board
feed.summary: Christopher Wiernicki, former chairman and CEO of the American Bureau of Shipping, has been appointed to Royal Caribbean Group's board of directors, increasing the board size to 14. Wiernicki brings over four decades of marine industry expertise in design, operations, safety, digitalization, cybersecurity, and clean energy transition. Royal Caribbean Group Chairman/CEO Jason Liberty highlighted Wiernicki's disciplined approach and deep marine industry knowledge as valuable assets for the company's responsible growth as a global vacation leader.

feed.title: GE HealthCare, BARDA expand collab with $35M AI-powered ultrasound expansion
feed.summary: GE HealthCare announced a $35 million expansion of its existing contract with BARDA to develop AI-powered ultrasound solutions. The collaboration aims to enhance diagnostic speed, reduce operator dependency, and improve trauma assessment, especially for mass casualty incidents, by creating new automated tools for lung pathologies and intra-abdominal injuries. GE HealthCare will also focus on developing robust point-of-care ultrasound solutions for challenging environments, building on its experience with systems like the Venue.

feed.title: Expeditors' Q4 Earnings Coming Up: What's in Store for the Stock?
feed.summary: Expeditors International of Washington (EXPD) is scheduled to report its Q4 2025 results on February 24th, with analysts forecasting a decline in both earnings and revenues compared to the previous year. While the company has a strong track record of beating earnings estimates, their model does not predict an earnings beat this quarter due to an Earnings ESP of 0.00% and a Zacks Rank #3. Despite expected strength in airfreight services and customs brokerage, challenges in ocean freight due to oversupply and weakening U.S.-China trade volumes are likely to impact performance, though cost cuts may help the bottom line.

feed.title: Familiar face: Why food and beverage companies are bringing back former CEOs
feed.summary: In a period of volatility for the food and beverage industry, companies like Boston Beer, Simply Good Foods, and Hormel are re-hiring former CEOs to provide stability and leverage their proven track records. This trend is driven by a desire for trusted leadership amidst economic headwinds and changing consumer preferences. While sometimes indicative of recent struggles, bringing back a familiar face can also be a strategic move to navigate challenging market conditions or prepare a company for a future internal succession.

feed.title: Occidental Petroleum Rose 6% in the Last 30 Days. Here’s How Much the Stock Could Rise in 2026
feed.summary: Occidental Petroleum (OXY) stock rose 6% in the last 30 days due to firmer oil prices, updated analyst commentary, and renewed institutional activity, with a recent trading price near $46 per share. TIKR's Valuation Model estimates a target price of $54, implying a 17% potential upside over 1.9 years, suggesting the stock is currently undervalued. This valuation considers a revenue growth CAGR of -4.1%, operating margins of 15.9%, and an exit P/E multiple of 34x, alongside factors like Permian Basin concentration, CrownRock integration, Direct Air Capture initiatives, and debt reduction.

feed.title: Crown Castle (NYSE:CCI) Given New $91.00 Price Target at Barclays
feed.summary: Barclays has lowered its price target for Crown Castle (NYSE:CCI) from $101 to $91, maintaining an "equal weight" rating, which implies a modest upside of 0.43% from its previous close. This reduction aligns with similar target trims by other analysts, resulting in an average price target near $100 and a consensus "Hold" rating. Despite these analyst adjustments, institutional investors like Vanguard and State Street have recently increased their stakes in the company.

feed.title: ServiceNow CEO steps up with $3 million stock purchase announcement as executives cancel stock-selling plans
feed.summary: ServiceNow's CEO, Bill McDermott, announced a $3 million stock purchase, and several executives, including the CFO, canceled their 10b5-1 trading plans to restore confidence in the company's stock. Shares saw a brief jump in early trading. This move comes after the software company's stock struggled despite positive earnings, with investors concerned about AI's potential disruption and recent acquisitions.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks To Acquire ‘Agentic Endpoint’ Security Startup Koi
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks announced its acquisition of Koi, a startup specializing in "agentic endpoint" security for AI agent usage on endpoint devices. This acquisition aims to boost visibility and protection, integrating Koi's technology into Palo Alto Networks' Prisma AIRS platform and enhancing Cortex XDR. While terms were undisclosed, a previous report suggested a $400 million price tag, marking another strategic acquisition for Palo Alto Networks in the AI security space.

feed.title: Qlik Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Augmented Data Quality Solutions
feed.summary: Qlik has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Augmented Data Quality Solutions for the seventh consecutive time. This recognition highlights Qlik's commitment to providing robust data quality and governance solutions essential for reliable AI deployment at scale. The company's offerings, including the Qlik Trust Score™ for AI and automated data remediation, help organizations ensure high-trust data for confident AI outcomes.

feed.title: CLASS ACTION DEADLINE TONIGHT: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Reminds F5 Investors of the Securities Class Action Lawsuit Deadline on February 17, 2026
feed.summary: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating potential claims against F5, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIV) and reminds investors that the deadline to seek the role of lead plaintiff in a federal securities class action is February 17, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that F5 made false and misleading statements by failing to disclose a significant security breach affecting their key product, BIG-IP, which subsequently led to a dramatic decline in the company's stock price. Investors with information or who wish to learn more are encouraged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP.

feed.title: FL-JABIL-INC.
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. has released its Fiscal Year 2025 Sustainability Progress Report, detailing advancements in greenhouse gas reduction. The report also highlights the company's efforts in diverting waste from landfills and contributing to local communities. It underscores Jabil's ongoing commitment to environmental and social responsibility.

feed.title: Sysco Corporation stock hits 52-week high at 91.5 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Sysco Corporation's stock has hit a 52-week high of $91.50, currently trading at $91.76, reflecting strong investor confidence with a 30.94% increase over the past year. Despite the milestone, InvestingPro suggests the stock might still be undervalued, though its RSI indicates it is in overbought territory. The company recently surpassed Q2 fiscal year 2026 earnings and revenue estimates, although Moody's downgraded its long-term ratings due to increasing debt, while Guggenheim raised its price target.

feed.title: Jack Henry & Associates shares up 2.9% after Wells Fargo raises to overweight from equal weight
feed.summary: Shares of Jack Henry & Associates rose 2.9% following an upgrade by Wells Fargo from "equal weight" to "overweight." This rating change indicates a more positive outlook on the company's stock by the analyst. The news was published on February 17, 2026, and contributed to an increase in the company's stock value.

feed.title: FedEx stock reaches all-time high at 380.94 USD
feed.summary: FedEx stock hit an all-time high of $380.94, driven by a 43.25% one-year return and strong growth in logistics demand. Despite being considered overbought by InvestingPro, the company maintains a "GOOD" financial health score and has consistently paid dividends for 25 years. Recent strategic moves include a $1.45 quarterly dividend, a $2.6 billion investment in European parcel locker provider InPost, and raised price targets from various analyst firms, with expectations of $25 EPS by 2029.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks’ earnings are on deck. Here’s what could get the stock going again.
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks is preparing to report its fiscal second-quarter earnings, with analysts optimistic about the company's firewall business and recent acquisitions despite a broader software sector selloff. The cybersecurity firm recently completed the acquisitions of Chronosphere and CyberArk, which could contribute to its performance. Investors are watching to see if these strategic moves will help the company overcome current challenges faced by software companies.

feed.title: Cummins offers incentive as part of emissions recall
feed.summary: Cummins Inc. announced a new incentive program for owners of eligible RAM 2500 and 3500 model-year 2013-2018 trucks to complete Emissions Recall 67A. Drivers will receive a $500 prepaid Mastercard for completing a required software update, with the first 750 participants completing it by March 31 receiving $1,000. This no-cost update, which provides an extended warranty and improves NOx emissions without affecting performance, aims to encourage timely completion of federal requirements and maintain vehicle performance.

feed.title: Builders FirstSource reports Q4, full-year 2025 earnings
feed.summary: Builders FirstSource reported its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings, showing a dip in net sales and income due to a "below-normal starts environment" and "commodity deflation." Despite these challenges, CEO Peter Jackson expressed confidence in the company's ability to navigate uncertainty through differentiated solutions and investments, while CFO Pete Beckmann highlighted disciplined execution and strategic M&A for long-term growth as the housing market rebounds.

feed.title: Howmet Aerospace Plans Debt-Financed Acquisition of CAM Unit
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace announced a plan to acquire Consolidated Aerospace Manufacturing for approximately $1.8 billion, financed through senior notes and other debt. This strategic debt-financed acquisition aims to expand Howmet’s aerospace manufacturing portfolio and strengthen its competitive position. While the move signals growth, it also introduces leverage considerations and execution risk, as noted by Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, evaluating the stock as "Outperform" despite expensive valuation.

feed.title: John Deere Recalls 140 Workers As Tractor Demand Rises In Waterloo, Iowa
feed.summary: John Deere is recalling approximately 140 workers to its Waterloo, Iowa factory due to a slight increase in demand for its 8R and 9R tractors. This news comes after months of layoffs and declining sales, offering a small sign of stabilization in the struggling farm equipment market. Despite the recall, John Deere still anticipates a 15 to 20 percent decline in overall sales for 2026.

feed.title: Blackstone To Acquire Champions Group From Odyssey Investment Partners For Undisclosed Terms
feed.summary: Blackstone, Inc. announced that its perpetual private equity strategy (BXPE) funds have agreed to acquire Champions Group, a provider of essential home services, from Odyssey Investment Partners, LLC. Odyssey and the management team will retain a significant minority investment. The transaction's terms were not disclosed and it is expected to close in the first half of 2026.

feed.title: Insurance giant AIG deploys agentic AI with orchestration layer
feed.summary: AIG is leveraging generative AI with an orchestration layer, leading to significant improvements in underwriting capacity and operational efficiency. The company reports faster-than-expected gains, particularly in submission processing, and has integrated an internal tool, AIG Assist, across most commercial lines. This approach includes the use of AI agents as "companions" for real-time information, historical case analysis, and challenging underwriting decisions, ultimately streamlining complex workflows and reducing costs.

feed.title: Uber: Valuation Gap Creates A Massive Opportunity (NYSE:UBER)
feed.summary: Uber Technologies (UBER) presents a compelling buying opportunity, with its stock down 12% over the past year. The company is strategically leveraging a hybrid autonomous vehicle (AV)-human driver model to maximize utilization and leadership in the evolving mobility landscape, supported by strong Q4 FY25 results with 22% gross bookings growth and significant adjusted EBITDA and FCF increases. Uber's approach includes infrastructure development, AV partnerships, and data sharing, positioning it to benefit from market fragmentation and incremental supply despite potential CapEx increases.

feed.title: IHS Towers to sell Latin America operations to Macquarie for $952 million
feed.summary: IHS Towers announced the sale of its Latin American tower operations, including IHS Brazil and IHS Colombia, to Macquarie Asset Management for approximately $952 million. This move signifies the company's complete exit from the region and involves approximately 8,860 telecommunications tower sites. The transaction, expected to close later in 2026, aims to create shareholder value and aligns with IHS Towers' strategic initiatives.

feed.title: Tyler Technologies Named to 2026 GovTech 100 List
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies (NYSE: TYL) has been included in the 2026 GovTech 100 list for the tenth consecutive year, recognizing its role as a leading provider of software and services to the public sector. The company's president and CEO, Lynn Moore, highlighted how their solutions help government entities operate more efficiently and better serve their communities. The annual GovTech 100 list, curated by Government Technology magazine, honors companies making significant contributions to state and local government agencies across the U.S.

feed.title: FingerMotion Signs Non-Binding Memorandum of Understanding to Explore North American Minimal Viable Product and Marketplace Initiative
feed.summary: FingerMotion Inc. has signed a non-binding Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Digital Landia Ltd. to investigate developing a minimum viable product (MVP) and marketplace for North America. This initiative will explore integrating Digital Landia's AI and blockchain-based protocol framework with FingerMotion's existing mobility data infrastructure to create a B2C marketplace. The companies plan due diligence and potential negotiation of a definitive cooperation agreement within 60 days.

feed.title: ServiceNow stock rises after executives cancel share sales, CEO plans purchase By Investing.com
feed.summary: ServiceNow Inc. (NYSE:NOW) stock rose 4% after several top executives, including the CEO, cancelled their planned share sales under Rule 10b5-1 trading plans. Adding to investor confidence, CEO William R. McDermott announced plans to purchase $3 million worth of ServiceNow shares on February 27, 2026. This combined action of cancelled sales and a significant purchase by the CEO boosted investor sentiment.

feed.title: New IPF trial data: GRI Bio CEO explains lung repair signals
feed.summary: GRI Bio CEO Marc Hertz discussed additional positive Phase 2a data for idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF) in a Virtual Investor segment, highlighting biomarker improvements related to fibrosis and lung repair. This announcement reiterates the company's recent focus on its clinical story, following other milestones like a reverse stock split, patent protection, and financial updates. Investors are encouraged to monitor the progression of these Phase 2a results into later-stage trials and the company's capital raising activities.

feed.title: Teledyne Valeport Sponsors UK River Conservation Charity
feed.summary: Teledyne Valeport announced a year-long sponsorship of the Westcountry Rivers Trust (WRT), a UK-registered charity focused on protecting and restoring rivers in the South West. The funding will support educational workshops, field-based conservation, and career engagement for young people in the environmental sector. This initiative builds on Teledyne Valeport's existing commitment to marine conservation and aims to foster future environmental careers.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) Receives Price Target Boost from Mizuho A
feed.summary: Mizuho analyst John Roberts has increased the price target for Sherwin-Williams (SHW) to $410 from $400, maintaining an "Outperform" rating, indicating confidence in the stock's future performance. This adjustment follows other recent analyst actions, with the average analyst target price for SHW now at $388.24. Despite the positive outlook from analysts, GuruFocus estimates a potential downside of 3.9% from the current price based on its GF Value of $354.51.

feed.title: Blackstone nears $2.5 billion acquisition of home services firm Champions - Bloomberg
feed.summary: Blackstone Inc. is reportedly close to finalizing a $2.5 billion acquisition of Champions Group, a residential services provider specializing in heating, air conditioning, plumbing, and electrical work. The deal, which could be completed as early as Tuesday unless unforeseen complications arise, involves purchasing Champions Group from its current owner, Odyssey Investment Partners. This acquisition highlights a growing trend among private equity firms to invest in sectors less vulnerable to disruption from artificial intelligence.

feed.title: IHS Towers to Exit Latin America With $952 Million Sale of Regional Tower Portfolio
feed.summary: IHS Towers has announced its departure from Latin America through the sale of its tower operations in Brazil and Colombia to a Macquarie-backed entity for an enterprise value of approximately $952 million. This move, part of a shareholder value enhancement strategy, includes about 8,860 sites and is expected to close later in 2026, pending regulatory approvals. Macquarie Asset Management aims to bolster its presence in the region's 5G infrastructure, while IHS (IHS) stock currently holds a 'Buy' rating from analysts and a 'Neutral' sentiment from TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark.

feed.title: Analog Devices (ADI) Receives Analyst Rating Update from Stifel
feed.summary: Stifel has reaffirmed its Buy rating for Analog Devices (ADI) and increased its price target from $330 to $360, representing a 9.09% increase. This update follows several other analyst upgrades and price target adjustments for ADI in early 2026. Despite the positive analyst sentiment, the average target price from 33 analysts suggests a potential 6.94% downside from its current price, and GuruFocus estimates a larger downside based on its GF Value.

feed.title: News | RTX's Collins Aerospace named a Crystal Cabin Award finalist
feed.summary: Collins Aerospace, an RTX business, has been named a finalist for the 2026 Crystal Cabin Award for its SkyNook suite. This innovative suite transforms underutilized space at the aft of widebody aircraft into a semi-private retreat. It is designed to accommodate families, travelers with service animals, individuals with sensory sensitivities, or those carrying bulky items, providing extra privacy and comfort during flights.

feed.title: IHS Holding Aggregate Base Purchase Price Is R$3,550 Million (About U.S.$683 Million)
feed.summary: IHS Holding has announced an aggregate base purchase price of R$3,550 Million, which is approximately U.S.$683 Million. This financial detail comes from a Reuters report. The short article is categorized under mergers and acquisitions among UK stocks.

feed.title: Cantor Fitzgerald Adjusts Price Target on Arch Capital Group to $100 From $98, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald has increased its price target for Arch Capital Group (ACGL) to $100 from $98, while continuing to maintain a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions for Arch Capital Group's price targets. The company specializes in reinsurance, insurance, and mortgage insurance.

feed.title: Autonomous Research Adjusts Price Target on Arch Capital Group to $96 From $92, Maintains Underperform Rating
feed.summary: Autonomous Research has updated its price target for Arch Capital Group (ACGL) from $92 to $96, while retaining an "Underperform" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a revised outlook from the research firm regarding the insurance group's valuation. Arch Capital Group is a diversified insurance and reinsurance provider.

feed.title: Jefferies Adjusts Price Target on Essex Property Trust to $276 From $282, Maintains Hold Rating
feed.summary: Jefferies has changed its price target for Essex Property Trust (ESS) to $276, down from $282, while keeping a "Hold" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other recent analyst revisions for Essex Property Trust, reflecting various perspectives on the company's financial outlook and performance. The company recently reported its Q4 2025 earnings, with revenue of $479.6 million and core FFO of $3.98 per share.

feed.title: Announcing Kraken integration with ICE Chat, expanding institutional OTC access
feed.summary: Kraken has successfully integrated its OTC desk with ICE Chat, a leading instant messaging system operated by Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE: ICE). This integration allows ICE Chat's network of over 120,000 clients to connect directly with Kraken's OTC desk, providing access to deep liquidity in crypto spot and options markets. The collaboration aims to reduce operational friction and expand institutional access to digital assets through a familiar and compliant interface.

feed.title: American Express Global Business Travel Doubles Share Repurchase Authorization
feed.summary: American Express Global Business Travel (GBTG) has significantly increased its share repurchase authorization to $600 million, reflecting strong confidence in its growth trajectory, product innovation driven by AI, and robust financial performance. The company reported substantial revenue and EBITDA growth for both Q4 and the full year 2025, driven by accelerating business travel demand and the CWT acquisition. GBTG maintained its positive 2026 guidance, emphasizing the transformative potential of AI in business travel.

feed.title: Inside P&G’s waterless version of Tide detergent
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble is launching Tide evo, a waterless, plastic-free version of its Tide detergent, nationwide after successful testing in Colorado. This new format, concentrated into dissolvable fiber tiles, is the result of over a decade of development and 50 patents. While more expensive per load than liquid Tide or pods, P&G views it as a significant investment that combines the best features of its existing formats and contributes to its sustainability goals, such as reducing water and plastic consumption, though sustainability is not the primary marketing focus.

feed.title: ServiceNow executives cancel 10b5-1 plans; CEO to buy $3M of shares
feed.summary: ServiceNow executives have canceled their 10b5-1 trading plans, halting all future planned sales of company stock. CEO William R. McDermott plans to purchase $3 million worth of ServiceNow shares on February 27, 2026, at market prices. This move signals a strong belief in the company's future from its leadership.

feed.title: Equifax (NYSE:EFX) Earns Buy Rating from Analysts at Bank of America
feed.summary: Bank of America has initiated coverage of Equifax (NYSE:EFX) with a "Buy" rating and a $250 price target, suggesting a significant upside. This aligns with a general "Moderate Buy" consensus among analysts, who have an average price target of $240.33. The positive outlook follows Equifax's slight beat on Q4 estimates and its release of optimistic FY 2026 guidance.

feed.title: Cummins Offers $500 for Emissions Recall 67A on Ram Diesel Trucks
feed.summary: Cummins Inc. is offering a $500 prepaid Mastercard to owners of eligible 2013-2018 RAM 2500 and 3500 trucks who complete Emissions Recall 67A, a software update aimed at reducing NOx emissions. The first 750 participants who complete the recall by March 31 will receive $1000. The recall is free, takes less than an hour, and also includes an extended warranty on select emissions components.

feed.title: Blackstone moves to buy Champions Group, 1,800 techs for 150,000 members
feed.summary: Blackstone (NYSE: BX) announced an agreement to acquire Champions Group, a prominent provider of essential home services, from Odyssey Investment Partners, LLC. Champions Group, which offers heating, air conditioning, plumbing, and electrical services, currently serves 150,000 active members with over 1,800 field technicians. Odyssey and Champions Group management will retain a significant minority stake, with the transaction expected to close in the first half of 2026.

feed.title: Drivers Underestimate the Annual Cost of Car Ownership by More Than $4,500, New Synchrony Survey Finds
feed.summary: A new survey by Synchrony reveals that drivers significantly underestimate the annual cost of car ownership, paying nearly 167% more than expected, a discrepancy of over $4,500. This misinformation puts a strain on household budgets and shifts consumer behavior, with many opting to keep their vehicles longer. The survey highlights that insurance is the biggest contributor to these rising costs, followed by maintenance and repairs, and indicates that younger generations (Gen Z and Millennials) are leading spenders across various car-related expenses.

feed.title: The Cheesecake Factory to Present at the Raymond James 47th Annual Institutional Investors Conference
feed.summary: The Cheesecake Factory Incorporated (NASDAQ: CAKE) announced that its President, David Gordon, and CFO, Matthew Clark, will present at the Raymond James 47th Annual Institutional Investors Conference on March 3, 2026, at 9:50 a.m. Eastern Time. The presentation will be webcast on the company's investor relations website. The company also highlighted its financial performance, restaurant brands including North Italia and Flower Child, and its recognition in Fortune's "100 Best Companies to Work For" list.

feed.title: Legacy Education Announces Six-Year Reaccreditation Grant for Integrity College of Health from ABHES
feed.summary: Legacy Education Inc. announced that its Integrity College of Health (ICH) has received a six-year reaccreditation from the Accrediting Bureau of Health Education Schools (ABHES). This is the longest term awarded by ABHES and acknowledges ICH's high academic quality, institutional effectiveness, and compliance. The reaccreditation validates ICH's academic delivery and student outcomes, emphasizing the dedication of its faculty and leadership in preparing students for healthcare careers.

feed.title: Marqeta (NASDAQ:MQ) Now Covered by Analysts at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. initiated coverage on Marqeta (NASDAQ:MQ) with an "overweight" rating and a $6.00 price target, suggesting a 53% upside. This contrasts with the current MarketBeat consensus rating of "Reduce" and a $5.25 target, as most other analysts rate it Hold/Reduce. Recent insider selling has been observed, while institutional investors hold a significant portion of the company's stock.

feed.title: Wix and Intuit Deepen Partnership to Unlock Growth Opportunities for Small Businesses
feed.summary: Wix.com Ltd. and Intuit Inc. have expanded their partnership to provide small businesses with a more integrated experience for managing financial operations and online presence. The collaboration allows Wix users to utilize Intuit QuickBooks for deeper insights into profitability, cash flow, and tax liabilities, while also enabling QuickBooks customers to easily create websites with Wix. This partnership aims to streamline business management and foster growth by combining Wix's web creation and e-commerce capabilities with Intuit's financial management expertise.
